archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Modern Corporate Tech Hybrid
design_philosophy: Product-first, clarity-first minimalism. Inspired by Stripe, Vercel, and Linear. Emphasizes technical trust through minimalist aesthetics, vast negative space, pure white backgrounds, subtle green brand accents, blueprint-style 1px borders, and refined micro-interactions. Zero unnecessary decorative elements.

rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Headings > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines and technical labels MUST use the mono font, uppercase, with wide letter spacing.
Use #FFFFFF as the absolute primary background for a clean, sterile, high-end tech feel.
Use brand green (#16A34A) EXCLUSIVELY for primary actions (CTAs, active states, key data points).
Use extremely subtle grays (#FAFAFA to #F4F4F5) for section alternations or card backgrounds.
NEVER use full-screen color gradients. Stick to structural grayscale.
Generous spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical templates.
Grid Borders: Use 1px subtle borders (border-zinc-200) to create a 'blueprint/technical' structural grid.
Corners: Use tight border radii (rounded-lg or rounded-xl max) for a sharp, modern feel.
Do NOT center everything. Rely on left-alignment and asymmetrical grids to create visual tension.

buttons.primary: bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-900 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all flex items-center gap-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl p-8 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.default: w-full bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500/20 focus:border-green-600 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-400

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-zinc-200/50

rules: Subtle micro-interactions only. No aggressive bouncing or heavy parallax.
Use Framer Motion for gentle fade-ups (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on scroll.
Hover states on cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow.
SVG mockups should have drawing/tracing animations on initial load to emphasize 'technical process'.

hero_abstract.usage: Use as a subtle masked background for the hero section or high-end feature showcases.

dashboard_mockup.usage: Use in the portfolio grid or services catalog to demonstrate data/tech capabilities.

mobile_mockup.alt: Sleek mobile app interface on dark surface
mobile_mockup.usage: Use in portfolio or mobile responsive feature section.

modern_architecture.alt: Sleek modern architecture with green accents
modern_architecture.usage: Use in the 'About' or 'Process' section to represent structure and growth.

home_marketing.hero: Product-first. H1 title, technical mono overline. Action buttons. Right side: Interactive SVG mockup or abstract 3D visual.
home_marketing.services_catalog: Bento grid layout with 1px borders. Minimal icons (Lucide).
home_marketing.portfolio_grid: Asymmetrical masonry or strict technical grid showing real product mockups.
home_marketing.process_timeline: Vertical line with glowing active nodes on scroll.
home_marketing.contact_section: Clean, highly structured form with right-side AI consultant entry point.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark or extremely light), top header.
admin_dashboard.content: Dense, functional tables for leads. Use Recharts for simple lead volume metrics. Minimal padding, highly scannable.

global_elements.ai_consultant: Floating bottom-right button opening a clean, glassmorphism chat interface.
global_elements.footer: Massive padding (py-32). Dark mode footer (bg-zinc-950 text-white) to create a sharp contrast ending to the light page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT introduce new colors outside of the zinc grayscale and green brand palette.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Reserve Shadcn UI strictly for the Contact Form, Admin Dashboard, and AI Chatbot elements.
For the 'Interactive SVG Mockup', build a raw SVG with framer-motion path drawing animations to simulate a blueprint or wireframe being drawn.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Ensure 'Outfit' font is loaded for headings and 'Manrope' for body text (e.g., via Google Fonts in index.html).
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided URLs in the 'media' object.
For company logos in the social proof section, use typography + Lucide icons (e.g., <Hexagon /> Acme) in a desaturated, opacity-50 style.
Ensure the AI Chatbot feels premium—use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur) and precise border lines, avoiding generic bulky chat bubbles.
